Piper PA28-180 Cherokee - G-AWJE - Full ownership, Stapleford

Aircraft Type: Single Engine Fixed Wing
Year: 1969
Make: Piper
Model: PA28-180
Reg Number: G-AWJE
Airframe Hours: 5420
Engine Make: Lycoming O-360-A4A
Engine Hours: 820 SMOH (overhauled 2018 at approx 4600 hrs)
Prop Make: Sensenich
ARC: Valid to August 2025
Annual: Completed September 2024

Price: £34,950

Avionics: Garmin SL30 Nav/Comm, Garmin GTX 327 transponder (Mode C), KI 525A HSI, S-Tec Thirty altitude hold, Garmin GPS 296 moving map handheld. AI, DI, turn coordinator, VSI, altimeter — full IFR panel.

UK CofA (Type Certificated). Full IFR rated aircraft. Based at Stapleford Aerodrome (EGSG). Tied-down. Single owner for past 11 years. Logbooks complete from new.

Notes: A solid mid-life Cherokee with basic but complete IFR fit. S-Tec altitude hold is not a full autopilot — wing leveller only. Good cross-country tourer, economical to run.
